title: Legacy SFTP cipher suite
description: Partner SFTP server requires older cipher for compatibility with legacy banking systems
compensating_controls: IP allowlisting to specific partner IPs; dedicated network segment; file-level PGP encryption applied before transfer; monthly access log review

title: Development database unencrypted
description: Developer sandbox S3 bucket uses no encryption for performance testing with synthetic data only
compensating_controls: No real data permitted in dev; synthetic data generator used; quarterly audit of bucket contents; bucket restricted to dev VPC
review_outcome: Not renewed - bucket now uses SSE-S3

title: Prometheus metrics endpoint HTTP
description: Prometheus metrics scrape endpoint uses HTTP within private VPC. No confidential or restricted data. TLS adds latency to high-frequency scrape intervals (15s).
compensating_controls: VPC-only access via security group (no internet route); endpoint serves only system metrics (CPU/memory/disk); no PII or business data exposed; network traffic monitored by VPC Flow Logs; quarterly review of metrics exposed

title: AES-128 for webhook payload encryption
description: Webhook payloads use AES-128-GCM instead of AES-256. Webhook data is classified Confidential (not Restricted). Performance testing showed 15% latency improvement with AES-128.
compensating_controls: Data is Confidential not Restricted; AES-128 remains cryptographically secure; payloads also encrypted in transit via TLS 1.2; webhook data does not contain PII; 6-month review cycle

title: ML training bucket SSE-S3 instead of SSE-KMS
description: ML training bucket uses SSE-S3 instead of SSE-KMS. Contains derived PII features (income brackets and zip codes linked to customer IDs). SSE-KMS integration with SageMaker causes training job failures.
compensating_controls: Bucket has public access blocked; IAM policies restrict access to ML team role only; no raw PII - only derived/aggregated features; VPC endpoint access only; monthly data content audit; migration to SSE-KMS planned for Q1 2026 after SageMaker upgrade
